hero.title: Accurate diagnostics, compassionate care.
hero.description: Cadabam's Diagnostics is a Bangalore-based network of advanced diagnostic centres. We combine modern equipment, accredited labs, and specialist-led reporting so you get answers you can trust — fast.

mission.title: Vital health insights, without the wait.
body: We started Cadabam's Diagnostics with a simple idea: accessing vital health insights shouldn't mean sacrificing comfort. From routine blood work to advanced MRI imaging, every test should be handled with care, accuracy, and respect for your time.

Today, our team delivers reports in 6 hours for most lab tests, same-day reads for routine scans, and second opinions from specialists with 15+ years of experience — across 5 centres and a city-wide home-collection network.

items.title: Advanced equipment
items.body: 3T MRI, multi-slice CT, GE Healthcare X-ray, and high-resolution ultrasound — calibrated and serviced on a strict schedule.

items.title: Accredited labs
items.body: NABL-aligned quality controls, double-blind review on critical tests, and consistent reference ranges across every centre.

items.title: Patient-first care
items.body: Reports in 6 hours for most lab tests, gentle staff, transparent pricing, and free home sample collection across Bangalore.

items.title: Specialist-led reporting
items.body: Reports reviewed by radiologists with 15–25 years of fetal medicine, MSK imaging, and diagnostic experience.

services.title: From routine bloodwork to advanced imaging.

items.title: Lab tests
items.body: Blood, hormones, vitamins, liver, kidney, heart and more — 1500+ tests with home collection.

items.title: Radiology scans
items.body: X-Ray, MRI, CT, Ultrasound, MSK and pregnancy scans on modern, regularly-calibrated equipment.

items.title: Preventive checkups
items.body: Curated health checkup packages so you can stay ahead of your health rather than reacting to it.

items.title: Specialist consultations
items.body: Connect with radiologists and clinicians for second opinions and report walk-throughs.

milestones.title: From one centre to a city-wide network.

items.title: Cadabam's Diagnostics is founded
items.body: Our flagship Banashankari centre opens, bringing hospital-grade radiology to Bangalore neighbourhoods.

items.title: NABL accreditation
items.body: Our lab achieves NABL accreditation for medical testing, formalising the QA processes we built from day one.

items.title: Network grows to 5 centres
items.body: Indiranagar, Kanakapura Road, Jayanagar, and Kalyan Nagar centres open with consistent SOPs and reference ranges.

items.title: 1M+ tests delivered
items.body: We cross a million tests delivered across Bangalore with reports in under 6 hours on most lab tests.

centres.description: Same equipment quality, same SOPs, same reference ranges — at every Cadabam's Diagnostics centre across Bangalore.

cta.title: Book your test in under a minute.
cta.description: Walk-in, home sample collection, or a centre visit — choose what fits your day. We'll handle the rest.
